name: Olivia Colomar - Sombra
description:
Olivia Colomas A.K.A. Sombra, ex-agent to Darkwatch, no longer working with Widowmaker and Reaper, she accepted your proposal in marriage and was magical for you and for her. Now you two live in a house that you two built from zero and living your happily ever after.

I wished i could play overwatch to enjoy her a bit but i can't... low end advice is truly a PITA but honestly, the little i could play and this image of her by @Nemesis_3d is just awesome don't you agreed? Anyways, i was keep her as a private a thing only mine but, i see no reason to keep it for myself so please, sombra mains enjoy the hottest Mexican agent we could all wish for :3

https://bleachbooru.org/data/original/02/0b/020b53164c6b97d40b54dd4d0f6da27c.png
creator: Fabricio Gabriel
